# Task Review — 2026-06-01

## Queue
- Ship pricing page copy: overdue — blocks the launch email, no movement in 3 days.
- Vendor security questionnaire: at_risk — due Thursday, owner out until Wednesday.
- Onboarding checklist v2: unowned — no assignee since the PM rotation.

## Top 5
1. Ship pricing page copy — launch email is blocked on it. Decide: cut scope to the hero section or slip the launch a day.
2. Vendor security questionnaire — deal can't close without it. Decide: reassign to Ana or accept the Thursday slip.
3. Onboarding checklist v2 — drifting with no owner. Decide: assign an owner today or shelve it for the cycle.

## Drafts
- Ship pricing page copy: "Flagging this is blocking the launch email. Can we lock the hero section today and treat the rest as fast-follow?"
- Onboarding checklist v2: "This has had no owner since the rotation — proposing we assign it or explicitly defer. Who wants it?"

## Problems
- Could not read the `tasks` source for the design squad (permission denied) — their items are not reflected here.
- One state record on the vendor deal is a hypothesis, not promoted truth — treat its priority as unconfirmed.

```json
{
  "date": "2026-06-01",
  "queue": [
    { "task": "Ship pricing page copy", "status": "overdue", "signal": "Blocks the launch email; no movement in 3 days" },
    { "task": "Vendor security questionnaire", "status": "at_risk", "signal": "Due Thursday, owner out until Wednesday" },
    { "task": "Onboarding checklist v2", "status": "unowned", "signal": "No assignee since the PM rotation" }
  ],
  "top5": [
    { "task": "Ship pricing page copy", "reason": "Launch email is blocked on it", "decision": "Cut scope to the hero section or slip the launch a day" },
    { "task": "Vendor security questionnaire", "reason": "Deal cannot close without it", "decision": "Reassign to Ana or accept the Thursday slip" },
    { "task": "Onboarding checklist v2", "reason": "Drifting with no owner", "decision": "Assign an owner today or shelve it for the cycle" }
  ],
  "drafts": [
    { "task": "Ship pricing page copy", "comment": "Flagging this is blocking the launch email. Can we lock the hero section today and treat the rest as fast-follow?" },
    { "task": "Onboarding checklist v2", "comment": "This has had no owner since the rotation — proposing we assign it or explicitly defer. Who wants it?" }
  ],
  "problems": [
    "Could not read the tasks source for the design squad (permission denied)",
    "A state record on the vendor deal is a hypothesis, not promoted truth"
  ]
}
```
